name: John Marshall Bancorp, Inc.
business: John Marshall Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company headquartered in Reston, Virginia, primarily serving the Washington, D.C. metropolitan area. The material business operations are performed through its only subsidiary, John Marshall Bank, a Virginia chartered commercial bank. It provides a broad range of banking products and financial services to small to medium-sized businesses, their owners and employees, professional corporations, non-profits, and individuals.

exposures.sentence: The Bank originates, funds and services non-conforming 1-4 family residential mortgage loans for its own portfolio.
The Bank has an ownership interest in one of the nation’s largest privately-owned insurance agencies.
Some of our non-banking competitors, such as fintech companies, have fewer regulatory constraints and may have lower cost structures.

Loudoun County is known as data center alley as it has the world’s highest concentration of data centers with more than 30 million square feet of data center space.
